segments.text: Deliver me from my enemies, O my God; protect me from those who rise up against me.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: defend me: Heb. set me on high

segments.text: Deliver me from those who do evil; rescue me from bloodthirsty men.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: See how they lie in wait for me! Fierce men conspire against me for no offense or sin of mine, O LORD.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I have done no wrong, yet they are ready to attack me. Arise to help me; look on my plight!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You, LORD God Almighty, the God of Israel, rouse yourself to punish all the nations; show no mercy to wicked traitors.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They return at evening, snarling like dogs, and prowl about the city.
See what they spew from their mouths—the words from their lips are sharp as swords, and they think, 'Who can hear us?'
But you laugh at them, LORD; you scoff at all those nations.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You are my strength, I watch for you; you, God, are my fortress, my God on whom I can rely.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: God will go before me and will let me gloat over those who slander me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Do not kill them, or my people will forget. Make them wander about by your power, and bring them down, Lord our shield.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For the sin of their mouths, for the words of their lips, let them be caught in their pride.
Consume them in wrath, consume them till they are no more. Then it will be known to the ends of the earth that God rules over Jacob.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They return at evening, snarling like dogs, and prowl about the city.
They wander about for food and howl if not satisfied.

footnotes: and grudge if not satisfied: or, if they be not satisfied, then they will stay all night

segments.text: But I will sing of your strength, in the morning I will sing of your love; for you are my fortress, my refuge in times of trouble.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You are my strength, I sing praise to you; you, God, are my fortress, my God on whom I can rely.
segments.speaker: David
